result_excerpt: ## Failure-Mode Narrative: Sales Prediction Model Error Analysis ### Top 10 Largest Absolute-Error Rows | Rank | Order # | Actual Sales | Predicted | Error | Product Line | Deal Size | Country | Key Context | |------|---------|--------------|-----------|-------|--------------|-----------|---------|-------------| | 1 | 10322 | $12,536 | $3,907 | **$8,629** | Vintage Cars | Large | USA | Price: $100 vs avg $78 (+28%), Qty: 50 | | 2 | 10407 | $14,083 | $5,939 | **$8,144** | Vintage Cars | Large | U

Outcome: The sales model predicts well overall but misses high-value niche segments. Highlights: - DEALSIZE drives 76% of model logic, risking oversimplification of complex sales. - Top errors concentrate in Vintage Cars and Large Deals within the USA territory. - Caution: XGBoost installation failed, forcing a fallback to Random Forest regressor. Recommendation: Add product-tier features and retry XGBoost installation for better precision. TERMINATE
